name: Coding Tips Pro
description: Autonomous Instagram content engine — generates, renders, publishes, and tracks programming tip carousels
author: kumar

runtime.install: pip install playwright Pillow requests && playwright install chromium --with-deps

functions.name: growthCycle
functions.description: Full autonomous cycle: analyze → plan → create → render → publish → track

functions.name: fetchInsights
functions.description: Fetch latest Instagram analytics and save snapshot

functions.name: publish
functions.description: Publish a rendered carousel to Instagram
